case_title: SHANGRILA HOLIDAY TRAVEL VS CHEUNG WARREN MR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SHANGRILA HOLIDAY TRAVEL AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG WARREN MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-20-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO CHEUNG WARREN, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE OUT OF COUNTY.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG WARREN MR.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-20-1992, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-17-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
NOTICE OF CONTINUANCE TO WARREN CHEUNG RETURNED, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHANGRILA HOLIDAY TRAVEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEUNG WARREN MR. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $18.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,018.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO WARREN CHEUNG RETURNED, ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG WARREN MR.
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR SHANGRILA HOLIDAY TRAVEL ASSIGNED TO ALEXANDER AND MARTIN INC
